description_long: This is a large, rectangular stereo speaker system with a dark wood-textured exterior and a black front panel. The front face features two prominent circular speaker drivers of different sizes, a smaller tweeter above, and a round bass port below, all set into a matte black surface. The sides and top are finished in a dark, woodgrain pattern, giving it a classic, high-fidelity appearance. The rear panel includes a recessed control area with visible knobs and connection terminals, likely for audio input and speaker wire connections. There are no visible brand logos or decorative elements, emphasizing a utilitarian, professional design. The overall build suggests a robust, heavy unit suitable for stationary placement in urban environments such as garages, studios, or public spaces.
description: A large, dark wood-finished stereo speaker with a black front panel featuring multiple speaker drivers and a rear control panel. The design is robust and professional, suitable for stationary use.
description_view_0: The front view shows the black speaker panel with two large circular drivers, a smaller tweeter, and a round bass port.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a plain, dark wood-textured surface with no visible features.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a wood-textured surface with a recessed control panel containing knobs and connection terminals.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing a plain, dark wood-textured surface with no features.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A recessed rectangular panel on the rear with two knobs and two terminal connectors, arranged horizontally.
